extracted.title: ANRPL Storage Available Daily Capacity Notice
extracted.description:
Effective Gas Day March 6, 2026, the Available Daily Capacity for ANRPL Storage (Loc ID #STOR) will be:

Withdrawal: 1,220,430 Dth/day (previously 1,489,710 Dth/day)
Injection: 480,272 Dth/day (previously 361,952 Dth/day)

These capacity levels will remain in effect until further notice. Capacity is based on current field and unit availability and is subject to change.

This general posting may be superseded by planned or emergency maintenance notices.

Shippers are advised to review all applicable storage notices when making business or operational decisions.

For questions or additional information, please contact your Customer Service Representative or the Nominations and Scheduling Helpline at 800-827-5267.
